title: Tinker Time
description:
Navigating through an [red][sine]endless sea of corpses[/sine][/red], you find a [orange]mad scientist[/orange] scavenging for various scraps.

"Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next [green]atrocity device[/green]! How about it?"

options.title: Choking
options.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, the enemy loses [blue]6[/blue] HP.

options.title: Chaos
options.description: Add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue] Energy this turn.

options.title: Improvement
options.description: At the end of combat, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

notes:
This is a multi-stage customization event. After accepting the scientist's offer, you choose a card type: [gold]Weapon[/gold] (Attack), [gold]Protector[/gold] (Skill), or [gold]Gadget[/gold] (Power). Two card type options are shown randomly. Then you select a rider effect that modifies your chosen card — two rider options are shown randomly based on card type.

[gold]Weapon[/gold] riders: Sapping, Violence, Choking
[gold]Protector[/gold] riders: Energized, Wisdom, Chaos
[gold]Gadget[/gold] riders: Expertise, Curious, Improvement

The resulting MadScience card with your chosen type and rider is added to your deck.
